articles.headline: Reserve Bank of Australia monitoring Anthropic's Mythos AI over cyberattack risks
articles.summary: The Reserve Bank of Australia is monitoring Anthropic's Mythos AI model, capable of enabling sophisticated cyberattacks, and engaging regulators and entities to assess impacts on financial system safety and resilience. This signals growing global regulatory focus on AI-driven cyber threats to critical infrastructure.

articles.headline: Tech Sector Layoffs Accelerate in 2026 as Companies Pivot Harder to AI
articles.summary: Rising headcount reductions across the tech industry are driven by efficiency gains from AI tools, targeting roles that can be automated or augmented by generative systems. This trend accelerates workforce transformation, prompting businesses to rethink talent strategies amid productivity gains and pressure on knowledge workers.

articles.headline: The 4 Digital Transformation Trends Shaping Manufacturing in 2026
articles.summary: Manufacturers are building AI infrastructure like data centers, power systems, and semiconductors, driven by exploding demand for AI workloads that cascade through supply chains for electrical equipment, cooling, and construction. Elevated capex in advanced logic and memory through 2026 underscores industrial production as a key constraint on AI scalability, creating opportunities in manufacturing value chains.
